other_observers: None.; I am the finder. Cole Wild saw and photographed the bird on 3/23/2009. See photos at http://www.pbase.com/birdingwild1/new_photos.
specific_location: Jumbo Reservoir SWA, just west of picnic area north of the intersection of CR 28 and CR 3.
description: Seen with Ring-billed Gulls, bird was smaller and shorter winged, with noticeably forked tail. Black terminal tail band, black bands across wings, black neck collar, sharply demarcated black ear spot, large black triangle on primaries. Bill all black, longer than Red-legged Kittiwake bill would be.Behaviors: Seen in flight and on the water, picking at the surface.Call: Did not vocalize.Plumage: 1cy
